---
title: "The Vault"
---

The Vault is a repository containing a list of bioinformatic tools and scientific books. The tools are group by five categories: books, metagenomics, genomics, amplicons, metaproteomics and R.

![](image/vault.webp){fig-align="center" width="300"}

## Updates

At the moment the website is under construction. I hope to finish it during the next few months.

Last update `r today()`
